# Changes from 1.6.0 to 1.6.1

_Aggregated from releases across the o3-shop GitHub organisation since <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/releases/tag/v1.6.0"><code>shop-ce v1.6.0</code></a> (2026-05-07). Last updated: 2026-06-04 14:27 UTC._

## shop-ce (v1.6.1)

* docs+feat(#140): close §17/§18, archive change, auto-detect nested working trees by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/131">shop-ce#131</a>
* chore(#148): drop unused symfony/expression-language dep by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/135">shop-ce#135</a>
* feat(#145): auto-bump theme.php version line at release time by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/132">shop-ce#132</a>
* feat(#137): fail quality gate when coverage drops below 90% by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/133">shop-ce#133</a>
* perf(#112): speed up admin order overview (SQL index-friendliness + skip stats on detail view) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/138">shop-ce#138</a>
* fix(#125): Config::reinitialize must clear in-memory params before re-init by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/139">shop-ce#139</a>
* feat(#143): bin/oe-console oe:user:change-password + oe:user:create --role={admin|customer} by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/134">shop-ce#134</a>
* fix(#140): bump CI composer pin 2.2.21 → 2.2.28 (GHSA-f9f8-rm49-7jv2) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/141">shop-ce#141</a>
* Delete .github/workflows/tests.yml by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/142">shop-ce#142</a>
* test(#127): regression guard for docker.sh exit-code propagation by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/137">shop-ce#137</a>
* 124 make unit tests theme agnostic flip test fixture default to o3 theme by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/147">shop-ce#147</a>
* feat: multi-worktree Docker — shared MariaDB, per-worktree shop instances with isolated ports and databases by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/148">shop-ce#148</a>
* B 1.6 claude and scripts by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/151">shop-ce#151</a>
* Configurable log level for unknown-controller requests (bot probe noise) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/150">shop-ce#150</a>
* feat: add oe:module:rebuild-configuration command (#132) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/146">shop-ce#146</a>
* fix(#157): silence Composer autoload warning on `--no-dev` install by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/149">shop-ce#149</a>
* 109 test suite detects exceptions by scraping shared oxideshoplog error only substring exception fragile order dependent destructive by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/105">shop-ce#105</a>
* sec: symfony/dom-crawler and symfony/yaml CVEs investigated — not exploitable in O3-Shop, see report-cve-2026-05-26.md by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/152">shop-ce#152</a>
* chore: metapackage update resolves composer/composer advisories — re-baseline audit reports  by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/154">shop-ce#154</a>
* bc: Basket::getPaymentId() is now a required basket contract in OrderController::getPayment() by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/153">shop-ce#153</a>
* fix: ensure consistent log directory path handling in Config by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/155">shop-ce#155</a>
* 166 sourcebootstrapphp rewrite hard references exithandler breaks composer install for any 13x 16x upgrade with a non empty vendor by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/156">shop-ce#156</a>
* Adjust bin/release for the metapackage fold-out by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/157">shop-ce#157</a>
* fix(#166): guard ExitHandler registration with interface_exists() by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/158">shop-ce#158</a>
* refactor(#169): tag shop-metapackage-ce at --to verbatim (drop the --bump workaround) by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/ralftrapp">@ralftrapp</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/159">shop-ce#159</a>

* Security review: symfony/yaml & symfony/polyfill-intl-idn CVEs (Low) — not exploitable in O3-Shop; yaml fix deferred to Symfony stack migration by <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/nlo-tronet">@nlo-tronet</a> in <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://github.com/o3-shop/shop-ce/pull/162">shop-ce#162</a>
